      oshi.PlatformEnum
      Use PlatformEnum instead.

      Method
      Description
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform()

      Use PlatformEnum.getName()

      Use PlatformEnum.getName(int)
      oshi.PlatformEnum.getValue(int)
      Use PlatformEnum.getValue(int)
      oshi.SystemInfo.getCurrentPlatform()
      Use PlatformEnum.getCurrentPlatform() instead.
